subject: /api/kan endpoint in plan-frontend Worker: fetch KAN issues + completion % via Cloudflare Workers Bindings MCP

pass_if: GET /api/kan on plan.subagentknowledge.com returns JSON {issues[], completion_pct} sourced from KAN board via Workers Bindings MCP
completion_pct computed as completed/total of KAN issues
endpoint deployed via e2m-tf terraform, not manual wrangler/API deploy

subject: completion-viz render: status columns from e2m task_state enum (pending/in_progress/completed/blocked/failed)

pass_if: Worker root renders visual board with one column per e2m TaskState enum value
each KAN issue placed in its mapped status column with live counts
fail_if: columns diverge from e2m TaskState enum

subject: wire Figma dev-mode component handoff + e2m-tf entry so plan-frontend is terraform-created

pass_if: viz components match Figma dev-mode spec (tokens/spacing/colors) via dev-mode handoff
plan-frontend Worker + route declared in e2m-tf terraform module
terraform plan/apply provisions the Worker — zero manual API deploy
fail_if: component styles drift from Figma dev-mode handoff
Worker created via dashboard/API instead of e2m-tf terraform
